if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND b.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND b.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyBbm :: selectById */ b.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_bt.code_label AS bbm_type_cd_nm , cd_bct.code_label AS content_type_cd_nm , cd_bst.code_label AS scope_type_cd_nm FROM sy_bbm b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_bt ON cd_bt.code_grp = 'BBM_TYPE' AND cd_bt.code_value = b.bbm_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_bct ON cd_bct.code_grp = 'BBM_CONTENT_TYPE' AND cd_bct.code_value = b.content_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_bst ON cd_bst.code_grp = 'BBM_SCOPE_TYPE' AND cd_bst.code_value = b.scope_type_cd WHERE b.bbm_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyBbm :: selectList */ b.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_bt.code_label AS bbm_type_cd_nm , cd_bct.code_label AS content_type_cd_nm , cd_bst.code_label AS scope_type_cd_nm FROM sy_bbm b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_bt ON cd_bt.code_grp = 'BBM_TYPE' AND cd_bt.code_value = b.bbm_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_bct ON cd_bct.code_grp = 'BBM_CONTENT_TYPE' AND cd_bct.code_value = b.content_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_bst ON cd_bst.code_grp = 'BBM_SCOPE_TYPE' AND cd_bst.code_value = b.scope_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyBbm :: selectPageList */ b.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_bt.code_label AS bbm_type_cd_nm , cd_bct.code_label AS content_type_cd_nm , cd_bst.code_label AS scope_type_cd_nm FROM sy_bbm b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_bt ON cd_bt.code_grp = 'BBM_TYPE' AND cd_bt.code_value = b.bbm_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_bct ON cd_bct.code_grp = 'BBM_CONTENT_TYPE' AND cd_bct.code_value = b.content_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_bst ON cd_bst.code_grp = 'BBM_SCOPE_TYPE' AND cd_bst.code_value = b.scope_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(b.*) /* base.sy :: SyBbm :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_bbm b
